channel.title: SPL - Rainier Beach Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Rainier Beach Branch

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods will be holding office hours as part of their ‘Meeting Community Where They Are At’ Initiative.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Afterschool Lego Club
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Bring your creativity and imagination to the Lego club!

Event details

item.title: Toddler Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

At storytime, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Mobile Food Vendor Permit Support - Workshop #9 / Apoyo para la obtención de permisos para vendedores de alimentos móviles - Taller #9
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

Learn about mobile food vendor permits.This program will be conducted in English and Spanish.-------------------------------------Obtenga información sobre los permisos para vendedores de alimentos móviles.Este programa se realizará en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details
